title: polygala steudneri
intro: Polygala steudneri, also known as Yuan Zhi or Polygala root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polygala steudneri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala steudneri is often dried and then used in decoctions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
